codebuild.project.projecttriggers.BuildT.Description: Specifies the type of build this webhook will trigger. Allowed values are:     BUILD  A single build  BUILD_BATCH  A batch build

codebuild.project.projecttriggers.Filter.Description: A list of lists of `WebhookFilter` objects used to determine which webhook events are triggered. At least one `WebhookFilter` in the array must specify `EVENT` as its type.

codebuild.project.projecttriggers.Webhoo.Description: Specifies whether or not to begin automatically rebuilding the source code every time a code change is pushed to the repository.
